info.name: MKV Player
info.summary: Play Matroska (.mkv/.mka) files directly in the Nextcloud Viewer.
info.description: Plays Matroska `.mkv` and `.mka` files in the browser via the built-in Viewer, using an in-browser WASM remux to fragmented MP4 + Media Source Extensions. ASS/SSA subtitles render with libass. Unsupported audio codecs can optionally be transcoded with ffmpeg.wasm — no ffmpeg core is bundled; an administrator configures the core/wasm URLs in the admin settings.
info.author: David Schneider
